specific_location: 9257 County Road G. Home of Sheldon Zwicker and family.
description: A large oriole with long tail. Orange/Yellow head, black throat, two white wing bars, black back, yellowish rump, yellow belly and under tail coverts, long black tail. Curved bill.Behaviors: Working the elm trees and Trumpet Vine in the yard.Call: nonePlumage: adult
